user_query: My company is organizing a team-building event and we want to have it at a unique location. Can you recommend some offbeat places in the United States? It would be helpful to have the latitude and longitude coordinates of these places and their detailed information.

TaskList.description: Research and compile a list of offbeat locations in the United States suitable for team-building events.
Retrieve detailed information about each offbeat location, including amenities, capacity, and available activities.
Obtain latitude and longitude coordinates for each offbeat location.
